content.en:
After the god of the Underworld left, Ye Tian returned to the Endless Realm Alliance.

The god of the underworld was defeated in his hands this time, and he would not care about this matter anymore, and the other gods of the world could not do anything about him.

When the time comes, they will not dare to fight the attention of the Endless Realm Alliance. 、

Moreover, Ye Tian didn't need the support of the Realm Court Branch, if it weren't for the fact that the Endless Realm Alliance had become a super-large Eternal Realm Alliance, he wouldn't even be exposed to the Endless Realm Alliance.

Therefore, in the future, the Endless Realm Alliance will still rely on itself without any problems.

......

Boundary Division.

The god of the underworld returned, and the other gods immediately came to see the god of the underworld.

"Lord God of the Netherworld, how is the matter with the Endless Realm Alliance?"

A realm god asked urgently.

"From now on, I won't care about the affairs of the Endless Realm Alliance anymore!"

The god of the underworld said.

In an instant, he drove these realm gods out.

After these realm gods went out, they were all confused, not knowing what was going on.

"What's the situation, the god of the underworld doesn't care about this matter????"

A realm god was shocked.

"Could it be that the Ye Heaven Realm God gave the Stygian Realm God a lot of benefits, so he didn't care about it?" the other Realm God guessed and asked.

However.

But the Realm God shook his head, "It shouldn't be that the Ye Tian Realm God has given a lot of benefits to the Hades Wu Realm God, haven't you noticed that the Hades Wu Realm God is very annoyed?" This is a manifestation of extreme anger, it is obvious that the Ye Tian Realm God has offended the Hades Wu Realm God, but the Hades Wu Realm God has not dealt with the Ye Tian Realm God, there is only one possibility, that is, the background of the Ye Tian Realm God is very unusual. This time, it should be the Ye Heavenly Realm God who moved out of the backer, and the God of the Underworld couldn't afford to provoke him, so he came back in disgrace, so he was extremely annoyed. "

"There is really such a possibility, if the Ye Heaven Realm God had no background, how could he secretly cultivate a super-large Eternal Realm Alliance without the Realm Court knowing!"

At this moment, they were all extremely jealous of the Ye Heavenly Realm God.

Originally, I thought that the god of the underworld would definitely make the god of the Ye Heaven realm admit it.

Now it seems that the Ye Heavenly Realm God is not an existence that they can shake.

"What then?"

The other realm god frowned.

"Even the God of the Nether Realm doesn't care about this matter, let's leave it alone, otherwise we will really anger the God of the Ye Heavenly Realm, and we won't have any good fruit to eat!" After the Realm God finished speaking, he chose to leave.

Subsequently, several other realm gods also left.

......

Of course, these realm gods did not dare to provoke Ye Tian, it did not mean that other realm gods did not dare to provoke.

When the news of the Endless Kingdom Alliance spreads, there will definitely be many realm gods coming to the Endless Kingdom Alliance.

However, Ye Tian was not afraid of those realm gods, if anyone dared to come to the Endless Realm Alliance to make trouble, he would not allow it.

And just like that, time passed.

And many of the gods of the Eternal Realm knew about the Endless Realm Alliance, and they all came here one after another.

At this time.

Ye Tiandu didn't bother to come forward, and directly let his son Ye Xingchen deal with it.

In short, it is not allowed for any force to enter the Endless Realm Alliance, and whoever dares to force it in will be directly defeated.

And such a decision also made the Endless Kingdom Alliance offend a lot of realm gods.

These realm gods also found the gods of the underworld one after another, but the gods of the underworld did not want to come forward, and directly retreated and practiced, regardless of this matter.

......

this day.

Ye Xingchen has something to report.

"Father, some Eternal Dao Realm Terrans are in danger while they are training in the outside world!"

Ye Xingchen reported.

"In distress?" Ye Tian said lightly: "Isn't this normal?"

Ye Xingchen shook his head and said, "Father, this time is not a normal distress, but a lot of Eternal Dao Realm has fallen in a short period of time, and among them, there is also a Eternal Dao Realm with a perfect Eternal Dao body, the frequency of this fall is too fast, I investigated afterwards and found that they were attacked." The other party erased all traces, but it was because they were erased that they would not normally explore and fall, but deliberately attack and kill. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

"Father, I also have this guess!" Ye Xingchen nodded.

"Okay, I know about this, I'll take care of it. Ye Tiandao.

"Yes!"

Ye Xingchen retreated.

......

Eternal borders.

The Great Nation.

There is a force here, the Tianhe Dao Alliance.

The influence of the Tianhe Dao Alliance in the Eternal Kingdom is not small, there are more than 30 Realm Gods, and they are related to a powerful force in the Realm God Realm - Tianhe Dao Mountain, they belong to the forces under the command of Tianhe Dao Mountain in the Realm God Realm, and they are the representatives of Tianhe Dao Mountain in the Eternal Realm.

Therefore, the Tianhe Dao Alliance is very arrogant.

This time, Ye Tian didn't give face to the Tianhe Dao Alliance at all, which undoubtedly angered the Tianhe Dao Alliance.

The Tianhe Dao Alliance is not a god of the underworld, and the gods of the underworld don't care about this matter, but they want to take care of it.

Of course, the Tianhe Dao Alliance is not stupid, and it has already inquired about the information, and the Endless Realm Alliance has only one Terran Holy Kingdom in the realm of the God Kingdom, and there is no background.

So, they are not afraid at all.

At this time.

Inside the TRW Alliance.

A number of realm gods are discussing the Endless Realm Alliance.

"Guys, this time we attacked and killed a lot of Eternal Dao Realms from the Endless Realm Alliance, that Ye Heaven Realm God won't take action personally, right?"

"He's got to know who's doing it!"

"But you still have to be careful, that Ye Tianjie God is said to be already a middle-level powerhouse in the Eternal Realm God Realm, and our Tianhe Dao Alliance currently doesn't even have a middle-level Eternal Realm God Realm, if we really fight against the Ye Tianjie God, we are afraid that we are not opponents." "

"What are you afraid of? We dozens of realm gods will attack together, maybe we can besiege him!"

"Don't worry, even if the Ye Heavenly Realm God knows that we did it, he dares to make a move (good Zhao)? If he dares to make a move, notify Tianhe Dao Mountain, and send a few Eternal Realm God Realm mid-level Realm gods down, he can definitely kill him easily!"

......

Another time passed.

The Tianhe Dao Alliance has come to attack the Eternal Dao Realm of the Endless Realm Alliance.

this day.

The Giant Mountain Realm God of the Heavenly Dao Alliance suddenly attacked an Eternal Dao Realm of the Endless Realm Alliance.

However, just as he struck.

In an instant.

A terrifying force descended, instantly blocking the surroundings.

"It's a trap !!"

The face of the god of the giant mountain realm changed drastically.

He had already searched around, but he didn't expect to fall into a trap.

Rumble!

Ye Tian has descended.

He sent out his duplicate bodies one by one, following the eternal Dao realm of the Terrans, and as long as he encountered the attackers, he could know who was targeting the Terrans.

Now, sure enough, let him squat.
